title: auroral boundary tools
author: Hatch, Spencer Mark
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Added example script, made sure that installation via pip after cloning works, and that example 01__ellipse.py can be run without errors 
  git clone git@github.com:Dartspacephysiker/auroralbndrytools.git
pip install --editable ./auroralbndrytools/
steps_raw:
Added example script, made sure that installation via pip after cloning works, and that example 01__ellipse.py can be run without errors 
  git clone git@github.com:Dartspacephysiker/auroralbndrytools.git
pip install --editable ./auroralbndrytools/
